name: ccx
description: Automated dev loops with Codex review gates. Provides /ccx:loop (with --duet mode for Claude↔Codex alternating implementer turns), /ccx:forever, /ccx:supervisor (parallel Claude↔Codex duet orchestrator using `claude agents --json` for worker exit detection, with autonomous chat_ask answering, scope-overlap gating, and a visible/customizable Claude+Codex model ladder — economy/default/strong/max aliases, overridable via STATE_DIR/model-ladder.json, selected per task via --start-tier / BOARD model_start), /ccx:plan (seeds BOARD.md task rows with a model_start alias from a prompt or document), and an optional Discord chat bridge (/ccx:chat-setup + --chat).
